allow: Bash(bun -e "import { Database } from ''bun:sqlite''; const db = new Database\('':memory:''\); db.run\(''CREATE TABLE t \(id TEXT\)''\); const stmt = db.prepare\(''INSERT INTO t VALUES \(?\)''\); console.log\(typeof stmt.run\); console.log\(typeof stmt.get\); console.log\(typeof stmt.all\); stmt.run\(''hello''\); console.log\(db.prepare\(''SELECT * FROM t''\).all\(\)\);")

Bash(bun -e "import { Database } from ''bun:sqlite''; const db = new Database\('':memory:''\); db.run\(''CREATE TABLE t \(id TEXT\)''\); const txn = db.transaction\(\(\) => { db.prepare\(''INSERT INTO t VALUES \(?\)''\).run\(''a''\); db.prepare\(''INSERT INTO t VALUES \(?\)''\).run\(''b''\); }\); txn\(\); console.log\(db.prepare\(''SELECT * FROM t''\).all\(\)\);")
